Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Data Case A1 lists events from Retrieve raw metal sheet to Visual check Case B2 Follows the exact same pattern as A1 Observations The sequence is consistent across cases There is a clear chronological flow Resources change logically There is a distinct break between the Preheat step and the Welding step

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Drafting High Level Steps Segment 1 Retrieve Scan Place Align Preheat Theme Getting the raw material ready Name Material Preparation and Setup Segment 2 Pick up tool Weld A Weld B Measure integrity Theme Joining the parts Name Welding and Structural Integrity Check

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Refinement Can Welding and Measure weld integrity be separated Option A Keep them separate Option B Group them Decision Group them as Welding and Verification Refinement on Segment 1 Name Raw Material Preparation and Conditioning Refinement on Segment 3 Name Protective Coating Application

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Final Polish Ensure the distinction between Case A1 and B2 Self Correction on Measure Weld Integrity While it is a quality check it is specific to the welding Group it with Welding Final Plan 1 Material Preparation and Conditioning 2 Welding and In Process Verification 3 Surface Finishing and Curing 4 Final Quality Inspection

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review against Constraints Did I identify high level steps Yes Did I justify groupings Yes Did I name them Yes Is the format structured Yes

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Developing the Rationale Temporal proximity Events happen close together Logical dependency You cant weld until it is preheated Resource flow Operators and machines work in sequence In manufacturing process mining immediate inline inspection is often part of the same logical step
